LinkedIn people and company data: profil: LinkedIn people and company data: profiles, people search, companies, and recent posts.
Recent (default) serves cached data from: Recent (default) serves cached data from the last few hours when available; Realtime forces a live fetch for +2 credits (refunded if the live fetch falls back to cached data).
Spend ceiling for this one call. The cal: Spend ceiling for this one call. The call is rejected (and nothing is charged) if its quote exceeds this. 0 is valid: the error returns the call's quoted price without running it.
Company URL (e.g. https://www.linkedin.c: Company URL (e.g. https://www.linkedin.com/company/microsoft), the slug after /company/ (e.g. microsoft), or a website domain (e.g. microsoft.com).
Search people on LinkedIn by keywords an: Search people on LinkedIn by keywords and filters. Costs 10 credits including the first 10 results; each further 10 results add 1 credit (max 30 per call; trial keys are capped at 10).
Find people on LinkedIn by keywords, nam: Find people on LinkedIn by keywords, name, title, school, or company when you do not have a profile URL; for a known person use Get Person Profile instead. Provide keywords or a name/title filter — school or company filters alone are rejected. Do not combine a company NAME filter with limit 30; pass the company numeric id or URN (from Get Company) for the largest searches. Costs 10 credits for the first 10 results, +1 credit per further 10 (max 30; trial keys max 10). Results flagged is_anonymous are private profiles and cannot be fetched with Get Person Profile. Read-only search, safe to repeat.
Free-text query: a name, a title, or bot: Free-text query: a name, a title, or both.
Company name, slug, numeric id, or urn:l: Company name, slug, numeric id, or urn:li:fsd_company URN. Names are resolved automatically.
Same accepted forms as Current Company.
How many results to return (1-30). The f: How many results to return (1-30). The first 10 are included in the base price; each further 10 add 1 credit. Trial keys are capped at 10. With a company NAME filter keep this at 20 or less; use the company numeric id or URN for 30.
Cursor from a previous page. A cursor pa: Cursor from a previous page. A cursor page is a new call priced by its own limit, so prefer a larger limit over paginating.
Fetch a LinkedIn person profile by URL,: Fetch a LinkedIn person profile by URL, slug, or URN. Costs 4 credits; the first 2 profile sections are included, each extra section adds 2 credits.
LinkedIn profile URL (e.g. https://www.l: LinkedIn profile URL (e.g. https://www.linkedin.com/in/williamhgates), the slug after /in/ (e.g. williamhgates), or a urn:li:fsd_profile URN.
Extra profile sections to include. The f: Extra profile sections to include. The first 2 are included in the base price; each section beyond 2 adds 2 credits (max 4).
Identify what a LinkedIn URL points at (: Identify what a LinkedIn URL points at (person, company, or post) and get its stable id, handle, and canonical URL. Costs 2 credits.
Identify a LinkedIn URL before fetching: Identify a LinkedIn URL before fetching it: returns type (person, company, or post), the stable id, handle, and canonical URL. Messy URLs with utm params, www/m subdomains, or trailing slashes are fine. Skip this when you already have a clean slug, URN, or URL — Get Person Profile and Get Company accept those directly, so resolving first would waste 2 credits. Non-LinkedIn URLs are rejected. Costs 2 credits. Read-only lookup, safe to repeat.
Any LinkedIn profile, company, or post U: Any LinkedIn profile, company, or post URL, e.g. https://www.linkedin.com/in/williamhgates or https://www.linkedin.com/company/microsoft.
Fetch the recent LinkedIn posts of a per: Fetch the recent LinkedIn posts of a person or company, one page per call with a cursor for older posts. Costs 4 credits per page.
Person or company URL, slug, person URN,: Person or company URL, slug, person URN, or company website domain (e.g. microsoft.com).
Cursor from a previous page, for older p: Cursor from a previous page, for older posts.
Paste your Veezee API key. It is sent as:
Paste your Veezee API key. It is sent as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

If you do not have a key yet: the provision endpoint at https://veezee.io/docs issues a free trial key without account setup.
